name: Small Interactive Handheld Rattle Toy - Carrot - Cloud Island™
description:
Give your little one plenty of stimulation with this Carrot Small Interactive Handheld Toy from Cloud Island™. Made from 100% recycled polyester, this soft toy is designed in the shape of a carrot and is adorned with a mirror-like face plus blue star and peach ribbon charms to bring a whimsical touch to their toy collection. The soft handheld toy features a green scalloped handle for a comfortable grip and has multiple embossed segments to help enhance their sensory development.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
